chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 329 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Office objection-as Flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.07.2025. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w. SDPO/ DSP, Hyderi, Insp. Ghafoor Chutto, SHO, Taluka, Insp. Nisar Brohi, SHO, Rehmatpur, SIP- Ali Dost, on behalf of SSP, Larkana. ------------ Progress report has been filed by Chairman JIT/SDPO, Hyderi and SSP, Larkana, stating there in that F.I.R. bearing Crime No.90 of 2020, of Police Station Rehmatpur District, Larkana, under section 365-A PPC r/w section 7 ATA was registered and after usual investigation report under section 173 Cr.PC (Challan) with regard to alleged abduction of Ayaz ahmed aged about 22 years was submitted before learned trial court and at present the trial has been commenced, number of witnesses have been examined. In view of above position, it appears that after lodging of F.I.R and submission of challan, it is the criminal court to proceed with the case and decide the matter in accordance with law and this Court needs no interference in the smooth process of trial. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby disposed of. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
